description: The abase::vector template, compiled as a 32-bit MSVC struct with pack(1). Stores four 4-byte fields mirroring std::vector internals. In the binary file, the _cur_size field at offset +12 is the only field that carries useful data: it tells the reader how many elements of type T to expect in the variable section.

fields.name: _data
fields.description: Runtime heap pointer to the element array. Zero in freshly serialized data. Ignore when parsing the binary.

fields.name: _finish
fields.description: Runtime one-past-end pointer. Ignore when parsing.

fields.name: _cur_size
fields.description: KEY: Element count as of serialization. Read this field to know how many T-sized records follow in the variable data section.

usage_examples.variable_section: n×int32 key IDs + n×int32 values + n×bool change-types where n = _cur_size
n×int32 keys + n×int32 values + n×bool types
